prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 西藏大学在甘肃省理科组（2023年理科/2024-2025年物理类）最低位次：2023年约21741名，2024年约42406名，2025年约45138名。2023年至2024年位次大幅后移约20665名，主要因甘肃省当年起实施新高考（3+1+2模式），科类划分与计分方式变化导致位次体系重构；2024至2025年继续后移约2732名，显示竞争持续加剧。2025年基准位次约45138名；该校在甘肃省理科组计划人数：2024年66人，2025年68人（小幅扩招），2026年61人，较2025年减少7人，缩招约10.3%。缩招意味着供给减少，在需求不变或增加的情况下，竞争将进一步加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西藏大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2022年约第189名，2024年约第192名，2025年约第195名，2026年未进入前200名，整体排名处于全国200名左右，属于中后段211院校。学校位于西藏拉萨，地理位置偏远，对甘肃考生存在一定地域距离阻力；抖音学校热度总排名第30位，评价为「较热」，综合热度约138万，在211院校中属于中等偏上曝光水平，短视频平台上有一定关注度。声誉评价文件中未收录西藏大学相关舆情事件，未见明显负面或断档信号；第五轮学科评估文件中未收录西藏大学数据，表明该校暂无A-及以上等级学科，学科竞争力整体偏弱，对高分考生的吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，但西藏大学在甘肃理科组招生的专业以临床医学、生态学、化学（师范类）、计算机科学与技术、土木工程等为主，其中计算机科学与技术（社会热度高热推荐）为热门方向。甘肃省2025年物理类考生约121443人，2026年总考生约218700人，按近年物理类占比约67%估算，2026年物理类考生约14.6万人，较2025年增加约2.4万人（增幅约20%），考生规模显著扩大，竞争压力上升。；西藏大学位于西藏拉萨市，与甘肃省相邻但距离较远，跨省就读意愿受地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次45138名、2026年缩招约10.3%（供给减少推高竞争）、甘肃省物理类考生增加约20%（需求扩大推高竞争）以及学校211层次与中等抖音热度等因素，但考生大幅增加及专业热度上升使竞争加剧，经有限修正后预测2026年最低位次约42651名，较2025年45138名前移约2487名（位次数字减小=更易进），区间42151–43151名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking of Tibet University in the Gansu Province Science Group (2023 Science / 2024-2025 Physics Category): approximately 21,741 in 2023, approximately 42,406 in 2024, and approximately 45,138 in 2025. From 2023 to 2024, the ranking significantly shifted backward by about 20,665 places, mainly due to the implementation of the new college entrance examination (3+1+2 model) starting that year in Gansu Province, which caused a restructuring of the ranking system due to changes in subject classification and scoring methods; from 2024 to 2025, it continued to shift backward by about 2,732 places, indicating intensifying competition. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 45,138; the planned enrollment of this university in the Gansu Province Science Group: 66 in 2024, 68 in 2025 (slight expansion), and 61 in 2026, a decrease of 7 compared to 2025, a reduction of about 10.3%. Enrollment reduction means decreased supply, and if demand remains unchanged or increases, competition will further intensify.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked approximately 189th in 2022, approximately 192nd in 2024, approximately 195th in 2025, and did not enter the top 200 in 2026, with an overall ranking around 200th nationally, placing it in the middle-to-late segment of 211 universities. The university is located in Lhasa, Tibet, with a remote geographical location, creating some distance resistance for Gansu candidates; its Douyin school popularity ranks 30th overall, rated as 'relatively hot,' with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.38 million, which is at a medium-to-high exposure level among 211 universities, with a certain degree of attention on short video platforms. The reputation evaluation file does not include any public opinion incidents related to Tibet University, with no obvious negative or gap signals; the fifth round of discipline evaluation files does not include data for Tibet University, indicating that the university currently has no A- or above-level disciplines, with overall weak disciplinary competitiveness and limited appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, but the majors recruited by Tibet University in the Gansu Province Science Group mainly include Clinical Medicine, Ecology, Chemistry (Teacher Training), Computer Science and Technology, and Civil Engineering, among which Computer Science and Technology (highly recommended due to social popularity) is a hot direction. In 2025, there were approximately 121,443 Physics Category candidates in Gansu Province, and in 2026, the total number of candidates is about 218,700. Estimating the Physics Category proportion at about 67% in recent years, the number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is about 146,000, an increase of about 24,000 compared to 2025 (an increase of about 20%), with a significant expansion in the candidate pool and increased competitive pressure. Tibet University is located in Lhasa, Tibet, adjacent to Gansu Province but at a considerable distance, so the willingness to study across provinces is influenced by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 45,138, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 10.3% (decreased supply driving up competition), the increase in Gansu Province Physics Category candidates by about 20% (expanded demand driving up competition), and factors such as the university's 211 level and medium Douyin popularity, but the significant increase in candidates and rising major popularity intensify competition. After limited correction, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 42,651, moving forward by about 2,487 places compared to 45,138 in 2025 (a smaller ranking number means easier admission), with a range of 42,151–43,151.

- Accounting
- Ecology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Communication Engineering
- Transportation

- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Teacher Training)
- Civil Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Architecture
- Administrative Management
- English (Foreign language requirement: English)
- Environmental Science (Ethnic Language Category).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 42,651, range 42,151–43,151. Candidates within this range are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 42,000) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular majors such as Clinical Medicine and Computer Science and Technology; candidates with rankings close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 43,000) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking of Tibet University in the Gansu Province Liberal Arts Group (History Category): approximately 12,847 in 2024, approximately 10,678 in 2025. From 2024 to 2025, it moved forward by about 2,169 places (a decrease in ranking number indicates easier admission), showing a decline in application popularity or eased competition. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 10,678; the planned enrollment for this university in the Gansu Province Liberal Arts Group: 28 in 2024, 27 in 2025 (a slight reduction of 1), 29 in 2026, an increase of 2 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 7.4%. Expansion means increased supply, and with unchanged or declining demand, competition will ease somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science ranking is around 200th nationally, placing it in the mid-to-late range of 211 universities. The university is located in Lhasa, Tibet, a geographically remote area, creating regional distance resistance for Gansu candidates; its Douyin popularity ranks 30th overall, rated as 'relatively hot', with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.38 million, which is above-average exposure among 211 institutions. The reputation evaluation file does not include any public opinion incidents related to Tibet University; the fifth round of discipline evaluation files does not include data for Tibet University, with no A- or above-level disciplines, and the overall competitiveness of liberal arts disciplines is relatively weak.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Chinese Language and Literature, Law, and Ideological and Political Education (Teacher Training) have socially differentiated popularity ranging from watchful to recommended. In 2025, there are approximately 58,374 history category candidates in Gansu Province, and in 2026, the total number of candidates is about 218,700. Based on the recent history category proportion of about 33%, it is estimated that there will be about 73,000 history category candidates in 2026, an increase of about 15,000 compared to 2025 (an increase of about 25%), significantly expanding the candidate pool and increasing competitive pressure. Tibet University is located in Lhasa, Tibet, adjacent to Gansu Province but at a considerable distance, and the willingness to study across provinces is influenced by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10,678, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 7.4% (increased supply eases competition), the increase in Gansu history category candidates by about 25% (expanded demand intensifies competition), and the university's 211 level and moderate Douyin popularity, the significant increase in candidates further heightens competition. After limited correction, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 11,253, moving back by about 575 places compared to 2025's 10,678 (an increase in ranking number indicates harder admission), with a range of 10,753–11,753.
